content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Attorney-review disclaimer is included only at the end, but checklist requires it at the top of the output.", "fix": "Move or duplicate the attorney-review disclaimer to the very top of the letter before any substantive content."}, {"problem": "ADS fixed defaults are referenced in the goal and checklist but not explicitly identified or confirmed as applied anywhere in the draft.", "fix": "Add a short clause stating that ADS fixed defaults have been applied, or explicitly list them where relevant (e.g., hours, leave, probation, notice)."}, {"problem": "Pakistan labour law compliance table (Pipeline G requirement) is not present.", "fix": "Append a brief Pakistan labour law compliance table mapping key clauses (hours, leave, termination, benefits) to statutory requirements."}, {"problem": "Checklist items about jurisdiction-specific rules (anti-indemnity, retainage, prompt payment, prevailing wage), flow-down obligations, NNN maintenance, and ratification clause are not addressed at all.", "fix": "Add a short statement confirming these items are not applicable to this employment offer or, if required by the pipeline, include minimal clauses/notes addressing each checklist point."}]}
